contents:
(** * Colimit of the dependent sum of a family of diagrams *)

(** Given a family of diagrams [D y], and a colimit [Q y] of each diagram, one can consider the diagram of the sigmas of the types of the [D y]s. Then, a colimit of such a diagram is the sigma of the [Q y]s. *)
Context `{Funext} {G : Graph} {Y : Type} (D : Y -> Diagram G).

goals.conclusion: Diagram G
Diagram G
G -> Type
forall i j : G, G i j -> ?obj i -> ?obj j
G -> Type

contents: exact (fun i => {y: Y & D y i}).

goals.conclusion:
forall i j : G,
G i j ->
(fun i0 : G => {y : Y & D y i0}) i -> (fun i0 : G => {y : Y & D y i0}) j

contents: simpl; intros i j g x.

goals.conclusion: {y : Y & D y j}

contents: (** The embedding, for a particular [y], of [D(y)] in the sigma diagram. *)
Definition sigma_diagram_map (y: Y) : DiagramMap (D y) sigma_diagram.

goals.conclusion: DiagramMap (D y) sigma_diagram
DiagramMap (D y) sigma_diagram
forall i : G, D y i -> sigma_diagram i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D y i),
(sigma_diagram _f g) (?DiagramMap_obj i x) =
?DiagramMap_obj j (((D y) _f g) x)

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D y i),
(sigma_diagram _f g) ((fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D y i0) => (y; x0)) i x) =
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D y i0) => (y; x0)) j (((D y) _f g) x)

contents: (** The sigma of a family of cocones. *)

Definition sigma_cocone (C : forall y, Cocone (D y) (Q y))
    : Cocone sigma_diagram (sig Q).

goals.conclusion: Cocone sigma_diagram {x : _ & Q x}

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, Cocone (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion: Cocone sigma_diagram {x : _ & Q x}

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, Cocone (D y) (Q y)

contents: srapply Build_Cocone; simpl; intros i x.

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, Cocone (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion:
forall g : G i x,
(fun x0 : {y : Y & D y i} =>
 (fun (i0 : G) (x1 : {y : Y & D y i0}) => ?Goal@{i:=i0; x:=x1}) x
   (x0.1; ((D x0.1) _f g) x0.2)) ==
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : {y : Y & D y i0}) => ?Goal@{i:=i0; x:=x0}) i

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, Cocone (D y) (Q y)
forall y : Y, Cocone (D y) (Q y)
forall y : Y, Cocone (D y) (Q y)
forall y : Y, Cocone (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion: transport Q ?p (C x'.1 x (((D x'.1) _f g) x'.2)) = C x'.1 i x'.2

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, Cocone (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion: transport Q 1 (C x'.1 x (((D x'.1) _f g) x'.2)) = C x'.1 i x'.2

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, Cocone (D y) (Q y)

contents: (** The main result: [sig Q] is a colimit of the diagram of sigma types. *)

Lemma iscolimit_sigma (HQ : forall y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y))
  : IsColimit sigma_diagram (sig Q).

goals.conclusion: IsColimit sigma_diagram {x : _ & Q x}

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion: IsColimit sigma_diagram {x : _ & Q x}

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion: IsColimit sigma_diagram {x : _ & Q x}

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion: UniversalCocone SigmaC

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion: forall Y0 : Type, IsEquiv (cocone_postcompose SigmaC)

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion: Cocone sigma_diagram X -> {x : _ & Q x} -> X

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion: cocone_postcompose SigmaC o ?g == idmap

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion: ?g o cocone_postcompose SigmaC == idmap

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion: Cocone sigma_diagram X -> {x : _ & Q x} -> X

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion: X

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion: Cocone (D x.1) X

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion: DiagramMap (D x.1) sigma_diagram

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion:
cocone_postcompose SigmaC
o (fun (CX : Cocone sigma_diagram X) (x : {x : _ & Q x}) =>
   cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x.1)
     (cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map x.1) CX) x.2) ==
idmap

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

goals.conclusion:
cocone_postcompose SigmaC
  (fun x : {x : _ & Q x} =>
   cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x.1)
     (cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map x.1) CX) x.2) =
CX

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

contents: pose (CXy := fun y => cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map y) CX).

goals.conclusion:
cocone_postcompose SigmaC
  (fun x : {x : _ & Q x} =>
   cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x.1)
     (cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map x.1) CX) x.2) =
CX

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

hypotheses.body: fun y : Y => cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map y) CX
hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, Cocone (D y) X

contents:
change (cocone_postcompose SigmaC
        (fun x => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x.1) (CXy x.1) x.2) = CX).

goals.conclusion:
cocone_postcompose SigmaC
  (fun x : {x : _ & Q x} => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x.1) (CXy x.1) x.2) =
CX

goals.conclusion:
forall i : G,
(fun x : {y : Y & D y i} =>
 cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x.1) (CXy x.1) (HQ x.1 i x.2)) ==
CX i

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, Cocone (D y) X

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : {y : Y & D y i}),
ap
  (fun x0 : {x : _ & Q x} => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) x0.2)
  (path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ x.1) i j g x.2)) @
?Goal i x = ?Goal j (x.1; ((D x.1) _f g) x.2) @ legs_comm CX i j g x

(fun x : {y : Y & D y i} =>
 cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x.1) (CXy x.1) (HQ x.1 i x.2)) ==
CX i

goals.conclusion: cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x.1) (CXy x.1) (HQ x.1 i x.2) = CX i x

contents:
change (legs (cocone_postcompose (HQ x.1)
                 (cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x.1) (CXy x.1))) i x.2 = CX i x).

goals.conclusion:
cocone_postcompose (HQ x.1) (cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x.1) (CXy x.1)) i x.2 =
CX i x

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

hypotheses.body: fun y : Y => cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map y) CX
hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, Cocone (D y) X

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : {y : Y & D y i}),
ap
  (fun x0 : {x : _ & Q x} => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) x0.2)
  (path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ x.1) i j g x.2)) @
(fun i0 : G =>
 (fun x0 : {y : Y & D y i0} =>
  ap10
    (apD10 (ap legs (eisretr (cocone_postcompose (HQ x0.1)) (CXy x0.1))) i0)
    x0.2)
 :
 (fun x0 : {y : Y & D y i0} =>
  cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) (HQ x0.1 i0 x0.2)) ==
 CX i0) i x =
(fun i0 : G =>
 (fun x0 : {y : Y & D y i0} =>
  ap10
    (apD10 (ap legs (eisretr (cocone_postcompose (HQ x0.1)) (CXy x0.1))) i0)
    x0.2)
 :
 (fun x0 : {y : Y & D y i0} =>
  cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) (HQ x0.1 i0 x0.2)) ==
 CX i0) j (x.1; ((D x.1) _f g) x.2) @
legs_comm CX i j g x

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, IsColimit (D y) (Q y)

hypotheses.body: fun y : Y => cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map y) CX
hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, Cocone (D y) X

contents: intros i j g [y x]; simpl.

goals.conclusion:
ap
  (fun x0 : {x : _ & Q x} => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) x0.2)
  (path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x)) @
ap10 (apD10 (ap legs (eisretr (cocone_postcompose (HQ y)) (CXy y))) i) x =
ap10 (apD10 (ap legs (eisretr (cocone_postcompose (HQ y)) (CXy y))) j)
  (((D y) _f g) x) @
legs_comm CX i j g (y; x)

hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, IsColimit (D y0) (Q y0)

ap
  (fun x0 : {x : _ & Q x} => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) x0.2)
  (path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x)) @
ap10 (apD10 (ap legs py) i) x =
ap10 (apD10 (ap legs py) j) (((D y) _f g) x) @ legs_comm CX i j g (y; x)

(cocone_postcompose (HQ y) o (cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1) (CXy y) =
idmap (CXy y)

goals.conclusion:
ap
  (fun x0 : {x : _ & Q x} => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) x0.2)
  (path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x)) @
ap10 (apD10 py1 i) x =
ap10 (apD10 py1 j) (((D y) _f g) x) @ legs_comm CX i j g (y; x)

hypotheses.body: fun y0 : Y => cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map y0) CX
hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, Cocone (D y0) X

(cocone_postcompose (HQ y) o (cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1) (CXy y) =
idmap (CXy y)
cocone_postcompose (HQ y) ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y)) = CXy y

goals.conclusion:
ap
  (fun x0 : {x : _ & Q x} => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) x0.2)
  (path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x)) @
ap10 (apD10 py1 i) x =

hypotheses.body: fun y0 : Y => cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map y0) CX
hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, Cocone (D y0) X

(cocone_postcompose (HQ y) o (cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1) (CXy y) =
idmap (CXy y)
cocone_postcompose (HQ y) ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y)) = CXy y

transport
  (fun C : Cocone (D y) X =>
   forall (i0 j0 : G) (g0 : G i0 j0), C j0 o (D y) _f g0 == C i0)
  py
  (legs_comm
     (cocone_postcompose (HQ y) ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y)))) =
legs_comm (CXy y)

goals.conclusion:
ap
  (fun x0 : {x : _ & Q x} => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) x0.2)
  (path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x)) @
ap10 (apD10 py1 i) x =
ap10 (apD10 py1 j) (((D y) _f g) x) @ legs_comm CX i j g (y; x)

hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, IsColimit (D y0) (Q y0)

hypotheses.body: fun y0 : Y => cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map y0) CX
hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, Cocone (D y0) X
cocone_postcompose (HQ y) ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y)) = CXy y

(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D y i0) =>
 (cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y) (HQ y i0 x0)) =
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D y i0) => CX i0 (y; x0))

transport
  (fun C : Cocone (D y) X =>
   forall (i0 j0 : G) (g0 : G i0 j0),
   (fun x0 : D y i0 => C j0 (((D y) _f g0) x0)) == C i0)
  py
  (fun (i0 j0 : G) (g0 : G i0 j0) (x0 : D y i0) =>
   ap ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y)) (legs_comm (HQ y) i0 j0 g0 x0)) =
(fun (i0 j0 : G) (g0 : G i0 j0) (x0 : D y i0) =>
 1 @ legs_comm CX i0 j0 g0 (y; x0))

goals.conclusion:
ap
  (fun x0 : {x : _ & Q x} => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) x0.2)
  (path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x)) @
ap10 (apD10 py1 i) x =
ap10 (apD10 py1 j) (((D y) _f g) x) @ legs_comm CX i j g (y; x)

hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, IsColimit (D y0) (Q y0)

hypotheses.body: fun y0 : Y => cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map y0) CX
hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, Cocone (D y0) X
cocone_postcompose (HQ y) ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y)) = CXy y

(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D y i0) =>
 (cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y) (HQ y i0 x0)) =
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D y i0) => CX i0 (y; x0))

(fun y0 : G =>
 transport
   (fun x0 : Cocone (D y) X =>
    forall (j0 : G) (g0 : G y0 j0),
    (fun x1 : D y y0 => x0 j0 (((D y) _f g0) x1)) == x0 y0)
   py
   (fun (j0 : G) (g0 : G y0 j0) (x0 : D y y0) =>
    ap ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y))
      (legs_comm (HQ y) y0 j0 g0 x0))) =
(fun (i0 j0 : G) (g0 : G i0 j0) (x0 : D y i0) =>
 1 @ legs_comm CX i0 j0 g0 (y; x0))

contents: apply apD10 in py2; specialize (py2 i); simpl in py2.

goals.conclusion:
ap
  (fun x0 : {x : _ & Q x} => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) x0.2)
  (path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x)) @
ap10 (apD10 py1 i) x =
ap10 (apD10 py1 j) (((D y) _f g) x) @ legs_comm CX i j g (y; x)

hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, IsColimit (D y0) (Q y0)

hypotheses.body: fun y0 : Y => cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map y0) CX
hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, Cocone (D y0) X
cocone_postcompose (HQ y) ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y)) = CXy y

(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D y i0) =>
 (cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y) (HQ y i0 x0)) =
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D y i0) => CX i0 (y; x0))

transport
  (fun x0 : Cocone (D y) X =>
   forall (j0 : G) (g0 : G i j0),
   (fun x1 : D y i => x0 j0 (((D y) _f g0) x1)) == x0 i)
  py
  (fun (j0 : G) (g0 : G i j0) (x0 : D y i) =>
   ap ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y)) (legs_comm (HQ y) i j0 g0 x0)) =
(fun (j0 : G) (g0 : G i j0) (x0 : D y i) => 1 @ legs_comm CX i j0 g0 (y; x0))

goals.conclusion:
ap
  (fun x0 : {x : _ & Q x} => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) x0.2)
  (path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x)) @
ap10 (apD10 py1 i) x =
ap10 (apD10 py1 j) (((D y) _f g) x) @ legs_comm CX i j g (y; x)

hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, IsColimit (D y0) (Q y0)

hypotheses.body: fun y0 : Y => cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map y0) CX
hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, Cocone (D y0) X
cocone_postcompose (HQ y) ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y)) = CXy y

(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D y i0) =>
 (cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y) (HQ y i0 x0)) =
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D y i0) => CX i0 (y; x0))

(fun y0 : G =>
 transport
   (fun x0 : Cocone (D y) X =>
    forall g0 : G i y0, (fun x1 : D y i => x0 y0 (((D y) _f g0) x1)) == x0 i)
   py
   (fun (g0 : G i y0) (x0 : D y i) =>
    ap ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y)) (legs_comm (HQ y) i y0 g0 x0))) =
(fun (j0 : G) (g0 : G i j0) (x0 : D y i) => 1 @ legs_comm CX i j0 g0 (y; x0))

contents: apply apD10 in py2; specialize (py2 j); simpl in py2.

goals.conclusion:
ap
  (fun x0 : {x : _ & Q x} => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) x0.2)
  (path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x)) @

hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, IsColimit (D y0) (Q y0)

hypotheses.body: fun y0 : Y => cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map y0) CX
hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, Cocone (D y0) X
cocone_postcompose (HQ y) ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y)) = CXy y

(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D y i0) =>
 (cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y) (HQ y i0 x0)) =
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D y i0) => CX i0 (y; x0))

transport
  (fun x0 : Cocone (D y) X =>
   forall g0 : G i j, (fun x1 : D y i => x0 j (((D y) _f g0) x1)) == x0 i)
  py
  (fun (g0 : G i j) (x0 : D y i) =>
   ap ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y)) (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g0 x0)) =
(fun (g0 : G i j) (x0 : D y i) => 1 @ legs_comm CX i j g0 (y; x0))

goals.conclusion:
ap
  (fun x0 : {x : _ & Q x} => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) x0.2)
  (path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x)) @
ap10 (apD10 py1 i) x =
ap10 (apD10 py1 j) (((D y) _f g) x) @ legs_comm CX i j g (y; x)

hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, IsColimit (D y0) (Q y0)

hypotheses.body: fun y0 : Y => cocone_precompose (sigma_diagram_map y0) CX
hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, Cocone (D y0) X
cocone_postcompose (HQ y) ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y)) = CXy y

(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D y i0) =>
 (cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y) (HQ y i0 x0)) =
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D y i0) => CX i0 (y; x0))

(fun y0 : G i j =>
 transport
   (fun x0 : Cocone (D y) X =>
    (fun x1 : D y i => x0 j (((D y) _f y0) x1)) == x0 i)
   py
   (fun x0 : D y i =>
    ap ((cocone_postcompose (HQ y))^-1 (CXy y)) (legs_comm (HQ y) i j y0 x0))) =
(fun (g0 : G i j) (x0 : D y i) => 1 @ legs_comm CX i j g0 (y; x0))

contents: apply apD10 in py2; specialize (py2 g); simpl in py2.

goals.conclusion:
ap
  (fun x0 : {x : _ & Q x} => cocone_postcompose_inv (HQ x0.1) (CXy x0.1) x0.2)
  (path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x)) @
ap10 (apD10 py1 i) x =
ap10 (apD10 py1 j) (((D y) _f g) x) @ legs_comm CX i j g (y; x)

goals.conclusion:
ap f (1 @ path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x')) @ 1 =
1 @ ap (fun x0 : Q y => f (y; x0)) (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x')

hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, IsColimit (D y0) (Q y0)

goals.conclusion:
ap f (path_sigma' Q 1 (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x')) =
ap (fun x0 : Q y => f (y; x0)) (legs_comm (HQ y) i j g x')

hypotheses.type: forall y0 : Y, IsColimit (D y0) (Q y0)

contents: (** ** Sigma diagrams and diagram maps / equivalences *)
Context {G : Graph} {Y : Type} (D1 D2 : Y -> Diagram G).

Definition sigma_diagram_functor (m : forall y, DiagramMap (D1 y) (D2 y))
  : DiagramMap (sigma_diagram D1) (sigma_diagram D2).

goals.conclusion: DiagramMap (sigma_diagram D1) (sigma_diagram D2)

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, DiagramMap (D1 y) (D2 y)

goals.conclusion: DiagramMap (sigma_diagram D1) (sigma_diagram D2)

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, DiagramMap (D1 y) (D2 y)

goals.conclusion: forall i : G, sigma_diagram D1 i -> sigma_diagram D2 i

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, DiagramMap (D1 y) (D2 y)

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : sigma_diagram D1 i),
((sigma_diagram D2) _f g) (?DiagramMap_obj i x) =
?DiagramMap_obj j (((sigma_diagram D1) _f g) x)

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, DiagramMap (D1 y) (D2 y)

goals.conclusion: forall i : G, sigma_diagram D1 i -> sigma_diagram D2 i

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, DiagramMap (D1 y) (D2 y)

goals.conclusion: sigma_diagram D1 i -> sigma_diagram D2 i

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, DiagramMap (D1 y) (D2 y)

goals.conclusion: forall a : Y, (fun y : Y => D1 y i) a -> (fun y : Y => D2 y i) (idmap a)

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, DiagramMap (D1 y) (D2 y)

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : sigma_diagram D1 i),
((sigma_diagram D2) _f g)
  ((fun i0 : G =>
    functor_sigma idmap
      (fun y : Y => let X := fun y0 : Y => DiagramMap_obj (m y0) in X y i0))
     i x) =
(fun i0 : G =>
 functor_sigma idmap
   (fun y : Y => let X := fun y0 : Y => DiagramMap_obj (m y0) in X y i0))
  j (((sigma_diagram D1) _f g) x)

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, DiagramMap (D1 y) (D2 y)

contents: intros i j g x; simpl in *.

goals.conclusion:
(x.1; ((D2 x.1) _f g) (m x.1 i x.2)) =
functor_sigma idmap (fun y : Y => m y j) (x.1; ((D1 x.1) _f g) x.2)

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, DiagramMap (D1 y) (D2 y)
forall y : Y, DiagramMap (D1 y) (D2 y)

goals.conclusion:
transport (fun y : Y => D2 y j) ?p (((D2 x.1) _f g) (m x.1 i x.2)) =
m (x.1; ((D1 x.1) _f g) x.2).1 j (x.1; ((D1 x.1) _f g) x.2).2

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, DiagramMap (D1 y) (D2 y)

goals.conclusion:
transport (fun y : Y => D2 y j) 1 (((D2 x.1) _f g) (m x.1 i x.2)) =
m (x.1; ((D1 x.1) _f g) x.2).1 j (x.1; ((D1 x.1) _f g) x.2).2

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, DiagramMap (D1 y) (D2 y)
forall y : Y, DiagramMap (D1 y) (D2 y)

contents:
Definition sigma_diag_functor_equiv (m : forall y, (D1 y) ~d~ (D2 y))
    : (sigma_diagram D1) ~d~ (sigma_diagram D2).

goals.conclusion: sigma_diagram D1 ~d~ sigma_diagram D2

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, D1 y ~d~ D2 y

goals.conclusion: sigma_diagram D1 ~d~ sigma_diagram D2

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, D1 y ~d~ D2 y

goals.conclusion: forall i : G, IsEquiv (sigma_diagram_functor (fun y : Y => m y) i)

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, D1 y ~d~ D2 y

goals.conclusion: IsEquiv (sigma_diagram_functor (fun y : Y => m y) i)

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, D1 y ~d~ D2 y

goals.conclusion:
forall a : Y,
IsEquiv
  ((fun y : Y =>
    let X :=
      fun y0 : Y => DiagramMap_obj ((fun y1 : Y => diag_equiv_map (m y1)) y0)
      in
    X y i) a)

hypotheses.type: forall y : Y, D1 y ~d~ D2 y
